log: === INITIATIVE ===
Elf — Bardic Musician: 9 (d20:7 + 2)
Young Red Dragon: 9 (d20:9 + 0)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Elf — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Elf — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 12] CRITICAL HIT! 26 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 131/157
→ Elf — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Elf — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
⚡ Elf — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:10 total 20 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Elf — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Elf — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
Bonus action error: Invalid choice: Option not available: bonus-1
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 12] HIT! 14 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 143/157
→ Concentration save: [17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

→ Elf — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Elf — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 32/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
⚡ Elf — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:20 total 30 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Elf — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 14 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Elf — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Elf — Bardic Musician for 6. HP: 24/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
